mapper.select:
select "SENID" as senid, "TIME" as time, "IFCH" as ifch, "FACTV" as factv, "CYCLE" as cycle, "STATE" as state, "TS" as ts from wds.rtev
and "TIME" >=to_date('${stime}','YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and "TIME" <=to_date('${etime}','YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and "SENID" in
#{stcd}
order by "TIME" asc

select "TIME" as TM, case when "SENID"=12190083 then "FACTV"-0.26 when "SENID"=12200083 then "FACTV"-0.26 when "SENID"=11150083 then "FACTV"-0.26 when "SENID"=63301183 then "FACTV"-0.26 else "FACTV" end as UPZ, "SENID" as STCD, "STATE" as STATE from wds.rtev
and "SENID" in
#{id}
and "TIME" >= to_date('${stime}','YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and "TIME" <= to_date('${etime}','YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
order by "TIME" asc

select "TIME" as TM, case when "SENID"=12190083 then "FACTV"-0.26 when "SENID"=12200083 then "FACTV"-0.26 when "SENID"=11150083 then "FACTV"-0.26 when "SENID"=63301183 then "FACTV"-0.26 else "FACTV" end as UPZ, "SENID" as STCD, "STATE" as STATE from wds.rtev
and "SENID" in
#{id}
and "TIME" > to_date('${stime}','YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and "FACTV" < 10
and ROWNUM <= 2000 order by "TIME" asc

select "TIME" as TM, "FACTV" as UPZ, "SENID" as STCD, "STATE" as STATE from wds.rtev
and "SENID" in
#{id}
and "TIME" > to_date('${stime}','YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and ROWNUM <= 2000 order by "TIME" asc

select "TIME" as TM, "FACTV" as UPZ, "SENID" as STCD, "STATE" as STATE from wds.rtev
and "SENID" in
#{id}
and "TIME" > to_date('${stime}','YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and "TIME" <= to_date('${etime}','YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
